params.name: Great Wave
params.source: Lottery Machine (0.07%), Wishing (3%), Yamato Treasure Maps (20%)
params.description:
On Dec 25, 1821, Katsushika Hokusai created the best ukiyo-e masterpiece.

Great Wave recreated the scene of three ships moving on the surging waves of the Kanagawa waters. It expressed the bravery of the boatmen fighting against nature. His art did not only adopt a bold and direct style and technique but also conveyed a strong contrast between dynamic and static movements, showing a variety of rich expressions. It's irregular and unbalanced aesthetics was regarded by critics as a unique interpr …
